summary: Remote disk-full pre-install gate. No truthful remote volume-free source today (/wrapper/stats=RAM+VRAM only; RunPod console shows live volume via REST telemetry). Option A: add statvfs(/workspace) to wrapper /wrapper/stats (Pod image rebuild via mpi-ci). Option B: read volume used/total from RunPod REST getPod (no image, IF field is live). Then gate _startRemoteDownload: needed vs free, 400+ui:error. Pairs with MPI-99 local gate; match toast wording. Verify on 79/80GB Pod p3tayimai7po9t.
